context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 45 Promotions Engine is complete and verified. Key points: 1) Backend CRUD at /api/promotion-engine/promotions works correctly. 2) Safety preview at /api/promotion-engine/preview validates margin safety - 5% is safe, 50% is blocked. 3) Creating active promotion with unsafe value returns 400 error. 4) Frontend at /admin/promotion-engine shows form with all fields (title, type, value, scope, stacking policy, dates). 5) Live Safety Preview panel shows pricing breakdown with vendor price selector (50k, 100k, 200k, 500k). 6) Admin sidebar uses adminNavigation.js as single source of truth - no duplicate Settings entries. 7) Growth & Affiliates section contains: Affiliates, Affiliate Payouts, Margin & Distribution, Promotions.
